PowerShell($path = "src\\MandoCode\\Services\\Ai\\AIService.cs"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($path\); $hasBom = \($bytes.Length -ge 3 -and $bytes[0] -eq 0xEF -and $bytes[1] -eq 0xBB -and $bytes[2] -eq 0xBF\); $lines = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllLines\($path\); "Total lines: $\($lines.Length\), BOM: $hasBom"; "Line 1017: $\($lines[1016]\)"; "Line 1469: $\($lines[1468]\)"; $new = $lines[0..1015] + $lines[1469..\($lines.Length-1\)]; $enc = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($hasBom\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllLines\($path, $new, $enc\); "New total: $\($new.Length\)")

PowerShell($path = "src\\MandoCode\\Components\\App.razor"; $text = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path\); $esc = [char]27; $broken = "$esc[38;2;255;200;80m> {choice}$esc[0m"; $fixed = '[38;2;255;200;80m> {choice}[0m'; if \($text.Contains\($broken\)\) { $text = $text.Replace\($broken, $fixed\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($path, $text, \(New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\)\)\); "Fixed" } else { "Pattern not found" })

PowerShell($path = "src\\MandoCode\\Components\\App.razor"; $text = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path\); $escCount = \($text.ToCharArray\(\) | Where-Object { [int]$_ -eq 27 }\).Count; "Raw ESC chars in file: $escCount"; $text = $text.Replace\([string][char]27, ''\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($path, $text, \(New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\)\)\); $check = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path\); $idx = $check.IndexOf\("38;2;255;200;80m> {choice}"\); $check.Substring\($idx - 20, 60\))

PowerShell($path = "src\\MandoCode\\Components\\App.razor"; $text = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path\); $bs = [string][char]92; $u = $bs + "u001b"; $old = '\($"[38;2;255;200;80m> {choice}[0m"\);'; $new = '\($"' + $u + '[38;2;255;200;80m> {choice}' + $u + '[0m"\);'; if \($text.Contains\($old\)\) { $text = $text.Replace\($old, $new\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($path, $text, \(New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\)\)\); $check = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path\); $idx = $check.IndexOf\("38;2;255;200;80m> {choice}"\); $check.Substring\($idx - 30, 75\) } else { "OLD NOT FOUND" })
